evidence_quotes.quote: But sometimes video game developers/publishers are closing servers forever and you cant play a game for which you have paid before.
Like an ofline mode that you can acces at any time.

paragraphs.text: Hello, you may know that some videogames have an option to play this game with other people in real time, in other words- Multiplayer games. But sometimes video game developers/publishers are closing servers forever and you cant play a game for which you have paid before. I suggest adding that Developers/Publishers should have a plan for thius situations. Like an ofline mode that you can acces at any time. This will guaranty that you can acces any game that you have bought after the end of support.
